reviews.text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐ 10/10 – Highly Recommend!

Mr. Eyal Fuchs delivered absolutely exceptional locksmith service. I called regarding an issue with a door frame and a deadbolt that wasn’t seating properly, and he responded within 10 minutes of my call. After a quick and accurate diagnosis, he had the problem fully resolved in about 15 minutes.

He was 100% professional, courteous, and genuinely kind throughout the entire process. On top of that, he went above and beyond by offering—free of charge—to double-check and ensure that our new Schlage deadbolt lock was installed correctly and working perfectly.

Fast, skilled, honest, and personable service like this is rare. I wouldn’t hesitate to call him again and would recommend him to anyone in need of a reliable locksmith.

Eyal is amazing. We’ve had him work on everything from cutting new keys and rekeying locks to installing new hardware and closers. I cannot recommend Eyal and his company enough, very knowledgeable and capable.
Replaced all my locks and door handles, fixed our door frames while he was at it. Highly recommended!

Amazing job of installing a very complex schlag system. Price was great and the quality of work great as well. They were quick to respond and actually came out the same day I called. You can't go wrong with using Locksmith Solutions!

I had Locksmith Solutions out 2 times over the last few months. The owner/operator and this company is "top notch" for quality work, results you get, personalized and dedicated focus by the owner/operator. He's a great listener and is really dedicated to helping all customers who reach out to him for locksmith needs.

After the excellent experience in August, I contacted him to install a patio door lock in December that has at least a keypad and a physical key lock.

I called the main locksmiths in Colorado Springs because there are very few locks like this for a sliding patio door available on the market. Every single locksmith in Colorado Springs told me "there is no lock like that available" as I needed for my patio door.

Only Locksmith Solutions told me, "I will research this, find the best 'lock solution' for your needs and get back with you on the best options." He followed-through, did the research and came back with the top 2 best options available on the market.

After we discussed the options by phone, I chose the absolute best solution he found. Then he ordered this specific lock for me at a price point lower than I would have paid on Amazon or other supplier.

Locksmith Solutions provided a high quality solution to a need when all the others I contacted were either too lazy to research or had inferior knowledge of 2025 modern locks and new lock technology.

He installed the sliding patio door lock with a keypad and physical lock. It looks and works great! His research and "lock solution" was a perfect fit for my needs I expressed to him.

At same time all other locksmiths in Colorado Springs (at least 5 I talked to) told me "this type of lock does not exist." Ha, ha to them.

He was extremely helpful in demonstrating/teaching me how this lock works before the appointment was completed.

Even after the appointment and payment the owner/operator follows-up by sending me a very helpful step-by-step tutorial to make using my new lock easy.

Everything was 100% professionally done. The appointment's work was well organized and thought-out before hand and completely efficiently at the time of the appointment.

Thank you Locksmith Solutions, much appreciated! You did it when no one else could.
